episode.title: MTG Fast Finance EP 432: The Modern Horizons 3 Mega Meta
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and go over the first few big Modern paper tournaments since the release of MH3.
